reasoning: To hold the #1 spot on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena overall leaderboard, a model must overcome the flagship proprietary models from dominant companies like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google. Moonshot AI recently released 'Kimi K2 Thinking' on November 6, 2025, which has impressive open-source specs but is not yet listed on the arena leaderboard. Previous versions of K2 peaked around #5 overall when released in July and currently sit in the #11–12 range. The base rate for an open-source model from a smaller startup holding the undisputed overall #1 spot is extremely low, especially against end-of-year proprietary releases. Given that taking and keeping the top spot through December 31, 2025 would require a massive historical upset, the probability is very low.
